minimum_firm_capacity_margin_MW.notes: Negative margin indicates load plus reserve exceeds declared firm capacity.

minimum_heat_rejection_margin_MW.notes: Negative margin indicates declared heat rejection capacity is insufficient after reserve.

minimum_water_withdrawal_margin_m3_per_d.notes: Negative margin indicates declared withdrawal demand exceeds permit capacity after reserve.

minimum_wastewater_discharge_margin_m3_p.notes: Negative margin indicates declared wastewater discharge exceeds permit capacity after reserve.

legitimacy_margin.notes: Policy legitimacy margin is a model index, not a public-opinion measurement.

maximum_governance_risk_index.notes: Governance risk index is a model index, not a credit rating.
